summary: All 3 phases tested and verified. Phase 1: 5 bug fixes (BACKEND_URL crash, deactivation, Valentine's content, checkout DB, error messages). Phase 2: Bottom nav restructured (Mira removed, Remedies always shown). Phase 3: Bulk upload with template, preview, and upsert.

phase1_regression.valentine_package_api: PASS - Returns content for all 3 packages

phase2_bottomnav.code_review: PASS - Mira removed, 4 tabs for new users, 5 tabs for returning users

phase3_bulk_upload.template_download: PASS - Returns template with category, 2 tiles, 1 package
phase3_bulk_upload.bulk_create: PASS - Created 1 category + 2 tiles + 2 packages in one request
phase3_bulk_upload.data_verification: PASS - All created items accessible via public APIs
phase3_bulk_upload.upsert_update: PASS - Updating existing package works (name and price changed)
phase3_bulk_upload.admin_ui: PASS - Bulk Upload page loads with file upload, JSON textarea, instructions
